label: Validate Semantic Schema
description: Validate data against a Catena-X semantic model (SAMM/AAS submodel schema).

params.name: variable
params.description: Source variable containing the data to validate

params.name: semantic_id
params.description: Semantic model URN (e.g., urn:samm:io.catenax.serial_part:3.0.0#SerialPart) — fetched from Semantic Hub

outputs.name: is_valid
outputs.description: Boolean indicating whether the data conforms to the schema
